revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:吾妻神社 (木更津市)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96395457 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:吾妻神社 (木更津市) | revid=96395457 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=吾妻神社 (木更津市)|date1=2007年3月20日 }} ---- 削除後に記述する内容を新規作成。--[[利用者:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月26日 (月) 01:07 (UTC)
削除済みの為本文に転記--[[利用者:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月27日 (火) 15:18 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96395457 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:吾妻神社 (木更津市) | revid=96395457 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=吾妻神社 (木更津市)|date1=2007年3月20日 }} ---- 削除後に記述する内容を新規作成。--[[User:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月26日 (月) 01:07 (UTC)
削除済みの為本文に転記--[[User:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月27日 (火) 15:18 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Azuma_Shrine_%28Kisarazu_City%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Azuma_Shrine_%28Kisarazu_City%29 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96395457 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:52, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:吾妻神社 (木更津市) | revid=96395457 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=削除|page1=吾妻神社 (木更津市)|date1=2007年3月20日 }} ---- 削除後に記述する内容を新規作成。--[[User:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月26日 (月) 01:07 (UTC)
削除済みの為本文に転記--[[User:ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ|ゞ(￣ー￣ )アロエ]] 2007年3月27日 (火) 15:18 (UTC)
